dialogos.texto_en: (Wow...\n I had no idea there was a beach here.)
Oh?\nYou came here too, Uesugi-kun.
Hey, you guys are here too?\nThe ocean is really beautiful.
Yes, it is!\nAs expected of a beach named Emerald Beach.
Yeah, it's a stunning emerald green.
The sand is so white, too...\nWe unexpectedly stumbled upon a lovely place.
Why don't you come over here, Uesugi-kun?\nThe water is cool and refreshing.
Heheh!\nThe waves washing up to shore tickle my feet.
Hey, now.\nDon't get too carried away and fall.
Okaaay.
Geez, you're acting like children,\nrunning around like that.
(Well, I guess my spirits\n are also lifted by such a beautiful sea.)
Hey, those girls over there, are they twins?
They sure are.\nThey seem very close with their matching outfits.
(...Here we go again.\n Even though there are fewer tourists here\n than in other places, they still attract attention.)
(Though I thought it would be fine\n if it's just the two of them...\n It's only natural they stand out being this lively.)
Hey, let's head over to somewhere else.
What are you talking about?\nThis is such a beautiful coast.\nWe should fully enjoy it while we're here!
Ah, hey, don't go too far.\nIt'll be a hassle if you get tangled up \nwith any troublemakers.
Oh?\nWho are these troublesome people you speak of?
Could it be...pick-up artists?
Well, I suppose so.
Then, we'll do this!
Eh?!
Ah, I see! Like this?!
H-hey, what are you doing?!
What are you waiting for?
Actually, it's a pretty good idea, isn't it?
Just back off, will you?!
It's to deal with any troublemakers,\nso we can't do that.
Yes, that's right.\nWe can stay like this, and feel safe.
This is only going to make us stand out more.
Do you think so?\nIt's pretty normal in tourist spots, isn't it?
What kind of logic is that?\nJust back off already.
You said not to go too far,\nand now you're telling me to go away?\nYou're a very demanding person.
Well, I guess this could work, huh?
Is that so?\nYou don't seem to mind it, do you?
N-no, that's not what I meant!
I mean, what's my position in all this?
Is that bothering you?\nWell...
You might be a sleazy guy who's dating both of us\nat the same time.
Or, maybe you're a questionable guy\nwho deceives women.
Hold on a second! Don't just label me as the bad guy!
This way, any nearby troublesome guys\nwon't come near us, right?
But we're standing out even more, aren't we?!
You say that, but deep down you're actually happy,\naren't you?
N-no, it's not like that...
It's okay to not be embarrassed, you know.\nYou should be more honest with yourself.
(Teasing me like this...\n Could this be Ichika?)
(No, it could also be one of the other sisters\n acting like Ichika... Which is it?)
Are you happy, or not?\nThat's all I want to know.
It doesn't matter either way...\nJust please, get off me already!
*sigh*\nCome on, I feel like I'm wasting my energy for nothing.
But isn't this what you wanted, Uesugi-kun?
...Huh?
'I really love you five.\nI hope we can stay in this same relationship forever,\nthe six of us.'
You said that on the first day of the school festival.
Well, that's...
And then to 'not choose anyone,' on top of all that.
Words like that can lead to this kind of situation,\nif you really think about it.
Saying to 'not choose anyone' is a line\nthat couldn't be said, unless you had confidence\nthat all five of us liked you.
I-I didn't mean it like that.\nI just%p-2;――
Oh, come on. It was just a joke.
Yes, it was just a little joke.\nDon't worry about it.
What do you mean, a joke...
It seems like we really are attracting \ntoo much attention now.
Yes, shall we move before we cause any more commotion,\nlike we did before?
H-hey?!
(...Was she really joking just now?)
